title: Do AI Agents Know When a Task Is Simple? Toward Complexity-Aware Reasoning and Execution
acquisition_purpose: Primary-source acquisition for queued review-msebench-execution-redundancy-validity; this record does not claim a deep review.

paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v1 API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
paper.extraction_status: Full immutable 27-page v1 PDF extracted successfully. Title/abstract, benchmark methods and results, LLM-Case discussion, limitations/references, and final page were inspected for continuity.

official_release.ownership_evidence: The immutable arXiv v1 metadata comment and paper explicitly link this repository as the released code and benchmark.
official_release.license_status: No repository-level LICENSE, LICENSE.md, COPYING, or GitHub-detected license was present at the pinned commit. The vendored toml package has its own license, which does not establish permission for the project release. Redistribution and reuse rights for the project archive are therefore unverified.
official_release.inspectable_artifacts: Pinned archive includes the deterministic e3 package, MSE-Bench generators and policies, cost/oracle metrics, experiment and figure scripts, tests, generated result CSV/JSON files, and the LLM-Case harness with acceptance tasks, retained OpenAI summaries, run tables, oracle tables, and transcripts.
official_release.execution_check: Archive integrity passed. The documented python tests/test_e3.py command was attempted but could not start because pandas is not installed in the acquisition environment (ModuleNotFoundError). Dependencies were not installed and no untrusted release code completed execution; this is an environment limitation, not evidence that the release tests pass or fail.

claim_boundary: This acquisition establishes local, hash-pinned paper and release evidence only. It is not a deep review and does not validate C_min, ACRR, task complexity, execution redundancy, policy comparisons, cross-domain transport, capability, professional validity, reliability, production fitness, or readiness.
